'''fazhushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drag|drag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drag|drag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fazhushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzhishith|fæzhishith]] || [[word:fæzhishij|fæzhishij]] || [[word:fæzhishish|fæzhishish]] || [[word:fæzhishi|fæzhishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhuzhushuth|fazhuzhushuth]] || [[word:fazhuzhushuj|fazhuzhushuj]] || [[word:fazhuzhushush|fazhuzhushush]] || [[word:fazhuzhushu|fazhuzhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhushuth|fazhushuth]] || [[word:fazhushuj|fazhushuj]] || [[word:fazhushush|fazhushush]] || [[word:fazhushu|fazhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhufshuth|fazhufshuth]] || [[word:fazhufshuj|fazhufshuj]] || [[word:fazhufshush|fazhufshush]] || [[word:fazhufshuf|fazhufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazhushuthu|fazhushuthu]] || [[word:fazhushuju|fazhushuju]] || [[word:fazhushushu|fazhushushu]] || [[word:fazhushuku|fazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazhushuth|fazhushuth]] || [[word:fazhushuj|fazhushuj]] || [[word:fazhushush|fazhushush]] || [[word:fazhushu|fazhushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazhushuthul|fazhushuthul]] || [[word:fazhushujul|fazhushujul]] || [[word:fazhushushul|fazhushushul]] || [[word:fazhushukul|fazhushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazhushuthuthu|fazhushuthuthu]] || [[word:fazhushujuju|fazhushujuju]] || [[word:fazhushushushu|fazhushushushu]] || [[word:fazhushuku|fazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazhushuthun|fazhushuthun]] || [[word:fazhushujun|fazhushujun]] || [[word:fazhushushun|fazhushushun]] || [[word:fazhushukun|fazhushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazhushuthuoro|fazhushuthuoro]] || [[word:fazhushujuoro|fazhushujuoro]] || [[word:fazhushushuoro|fazhushushuoro]] || [[word:fazhushukuoro|fazhushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
